creator: mac@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Update to 0.52.0

Window Maker 0.52.0 needs WindowMaker-extra-0.1.tar.gz, so, I RUN_DEPEND 
graphics/wmicons ports that include WindowMaker-extra-0.1.tar.gz. This 
wmicons port enhancement send-pr in ports/10999.

Fix: gzip and uuencoded patch is here. (Sorry, I send-pr from web interface.)

----------
